infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: AGAPP uses your camera to capture photos of road damage and community concerns for verified barangay reports.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: AGAPP uses your location to geo-tag reports for LGU geofence verification under RA 10173.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: AGAPP may save captured report photos to your library.
